title: extra recipes
description: This mod introduces additional recipes to enhance the player's experience in Minecraft.
body:
This mod introduces additional recipes to enhance the player's experience in Minecraft, staying true to the vanilla style. It adds a layer of enjoyment to your survival or hardcore world. Notably, I've included a recipe for the highly sought-after item in minecraft.
The bundle.

I derive immense pleasure from creating Minecraft mods, and the satisfaction of how it turned out is undeniable. My Discord community has been a source of numerous ideas; please share more suggestions to fuel my continuous modding endeavors.
